content.en:
The Xuantu master immediately said: "Infinite master, here's the thing, that friend of mine is an eight-realm level master, but his strength is very close to the nine-realm level master, but he has not reached the will transformation realm, so he has no will clone, only a body. This time, he entered a place called the wasteland at the end of the realm, and ended up falling into it. The wasteland is indeed dangerous, but for the Nine Realms-level masters, as long as they don't go deeper, it's not very dangerous. And the place where my friend fell into the periphery is the periphery, and the Infinite Controller can gather his will to go there without the danger of falling. This time, I also invited several other Nine Realm-level controllers, all of whom went with their will. "

Go with a will clone, even if it falls, it is only a fallen will clone, and it takes a few more years to recover, and the loss is not big.

Moreover, the conditions offered by the other party are also very high, two statues of ten thousand phases.

For such a condition, Ye Tian naturally couldn't refuse.

"Okay, I promised! When will I go?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Ten days later!"

The master of the Xuantu said.

His friend was very urgent, so he could only give Ye Tian ten days to prepare,

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

In the blink of an eye, ten days have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian and the Xuantu Masters converged again.

In fact, Ye Tian didn't make any preparations, he could just go with this replica body, but he didn't bring five statues of ten thousand phases, after all, if it fell, the five statues of ten thousand phases would be gone.

However, he carries the blade of will.

The Will Blade is the power of the Will Transformation Realm, quite a will clone, and the combat power that has been improved is still a lot, and it doesn't matter if it is damaged, it can be condensed again, and it will not have much impact on him.

......

"I've seen the Endless Master!"

Nine Realms-level Controllers Feng Heng Controllers, Nine Realms-level Controllers Crow Controllers, Nine Realms-level Controllers White Shark Controllers, these three Nine Realms-level Controllers greeted Ye Tian.

The strength of these three is not weak, they are at the level of the fifth layer of the Taichu Tower.

However, their potential is limited, and it is difficult to improve, so they are not as good as Ye Tian.

Therefore, they were very respectful to Ye Tiancai.

Ye Tian also responded one by one, which can be regarded as acquaintance.

Then, they met the protagonist of this call for help, the master of the border fire.

Of course, an incarnation of the Frontier Fire Master.

This avatar is weak and doesn't help much, but it's still okay to lead the way.

Immediately, Ye Tian and these three Nine Realm-level controllers followed the Border Fire Masters to the wasteland.

The wasteland was actually not too far away from the Origin Realm Sea, so several people tore through the barrier of the Origin Realm Sea together, directly entered the end of the realm, and then shuttled and flew to the wasteland.

As for the master of the Xuantu, he didn't go.

After all, the strength of the Xuantu controller is too weak, and it is useless to go.

......

"Infinite Master, although your strength is stronger than ours, you still have to be careful, the wasteland is not an ordinary place, it is very dangerous there! Several of us have been to the wasteland a few times, and you should not have been to the Infinite Master. "

Feng Heng said the master.

"I really haven't been there!" Ye Tian nodded.

Of course, he also knows something about the wasteland.

For example, the Wasteland has a Wasteland aura that weakens the Eternal Master's body of control, and the longer it stays, the weaker it becomes.

As a result, the Frontier Fire Master is trapped here, and as time goes on, he becomes weaker and weaker, and eventually has no hope of escaping at all.

At this time, the Wind Heng Controller said, "The wasteland aura of the wasteland is only the most ordinary danger, and the real threat is the imperceptible forbidden lands, which are mobile. Plus, there are some terrifying taboos in the depths of the wasteland. "

"Taboo?"

Ye Tian was puzzled, he really didn't know much about this, because he only briefly learned about the information of the wasteland, and his time was limited, so he didn't know too much.

"Yes, taboos, for us, are taboo-like existences. The Wind Master explained, "Some Eternal Masters will be extremely weak if they are trapped in the Wasteland for a long time, and will eventually be assimilated by the Wasteland. Once assimilated by the wasteland, the will will will change, and it will become a wasteland taboo-like existence, and in the depths of the wasteland, it has been tempered by the breath of the wasteland, and the body of control will become extremely terrifying, and some of the wasteland forbidden life, the strength is comparable to that of the Nine Realms-level masters, and even the ten-realm-level masters. "

"The wasteland is so dangerous, will those forbidden beings comparable to those of the Ten Realm-level masters come out?" Ye Tian asked.

"They almost don't come out, because they don't have intelligence, they are like walking corpses, and they have a strict sense of territory, and they won't leave their place easily. On the periphery, there are almost no forbidden life, but the depths of the wasteland are almost all forbidden life. Primitive ancestors have been here and cleaned up the wasteland, but after a long time, there must have accumulated a lot of forbidden life there again, so let's not go deep into the wasteland. Feng Heng said.

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Soon, the crowd came to the wasteland.

The wasteland world is very large, encompassing a large area of the end of the realm, no less than a tenth of the size of a boundary river.

"Several, please protect me, otherwise my avatar will disintegrate when it enters the wasteland!" said the Border Fire Controller helplessly.

"No problem!

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the four of them protected the avatar of the Border Fire Controller and entered the wasteland.

Airplanes!!!

The aura of the wasteland came in, making Ye Tian and the others a little uncomfortable.

"This is the breath of the wasteland, and it really has some weakening effect on the body of control!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, the wasteland aura was still far inferior to the black aura at the root of the Xuantu master's body, and the two were not comparable at all.

Led by the Frontier Flame Master, the crowd continues deeper into the wasteland.

Suddenly.

The faces of the Feng Heng controller and the others changed: "Border fire controller, you deceived us, we are constantly deep, this is still the periphery, you won't be in the wasteland, right?"

The face of the controller of the border fire changed, and he immediately said: "The four seniors are really not the inner circle, but they are just close to the inner circle." "

"What, close to the inner circle, why didn't you say it before?" said the Feng Heng controller angrily.

The master of the border fire trembled and said: "I'm afraid that after I say it, you don't want to go, or ask for incomparably precious treasures, and I can't afford to give them!
